text: Whatever you do, whatever you eat, whatever you offer or give away, and whatever austerities you perform—do that, O son of Kunti, as an offering to Me.
explanation: Practical spiritual application for Day 351: Internalize this instruction to build supreme discipline and maintain steady focus today, navigating all student challenges peacefully.

text: For those who have accepted the boat of the lotus feet of the Lord, who is the shelter of the cosmic manifestation... the ocean of the material world is like the water contained in a calf's hoof-print.
explanation: Practical spiritual application for Day 352: Internalize this instruction to build supreme discipline and maintain steady focus today, navigating all student challenges peacefully.

text: O son of Kunti, the nonpermanent appearance of happiness and distress, and their disappearance in due course, are like the appearance and disappearance of winter and summer seasons.
explanation: Practical spiritual application for Day 353: Internalize this instruction to build supreme discipline and maintain steady focus today, navigating all student challenges peacefully.

text: For him who has conquered the mind, the mind is the best of friends; but for one who has failed to do so, his mind will remain the greatest enemy.
explanation: Practical spiritual application for Day 354: Internalize this instruction to build supreme discipline and maintain steady focus today, navigating all student challenges peacefully.

text: In this world, there is nothing so sublime and pure as transcendental knowledge.
explanation: Practical spiritual application for Day 355: Internalize this instruction to build supreme discipline and maintain steady focus today, navigating all student challenges peacefully.

text: Learned transcendentalists who know the Absolute Truth call this nondual substance Brahman, Paramatma or Bhagavan.

text: The supreme occupation [dharma] for all humanity is that by which men can attain to loving devotional service unto the transcendent Lord.
